01 / About

The Same Instructor.
The Same Authority.

Most academies make you choose between paperwork and performance. OPLO closes that gap — credential and capability live in the same place.

OPLO provides both the proof required by the State of Texas and the performance demanded by real-world private security operations.

There are academies and instructors operating in Texas who are not properly licensed, not fully accredited, or only partially authorized to issue private security certifications. The result? Officers paying for training and being left with certificates the state will not accept.

OPLO eliminates that risk. You get an instructor with state authority to credential you and the operational experience to actually train you — under one roof, the first time, without lapses or last-minute scrambling.

One stop shop. That matters.

// Authorized Certifications · Gold Standard
  • Level II
  • Level III
  • Level IV
  • TXPSB OC
  • ALERRT — CRASE
  • Stop The Bleed
  • LTC
  • ASP / Defensive Tactics
02 / Instructors

Trained By Operators.
Not Hobbyists.

OPLO is led by a USMC veteran with the rare combination most academies can't offer — state authority to credential officers and real-world operational experience to actually train them.

The same instructor who certifies you is the one who has worked the field. Owner and supervisor are accessible — you can call or text directly before you pay anyone else.

03 / Courses

Two Blocks. One Standard.

OPLO's curriculum is organized into two integrated training blocks — Force Application and Life Preservation — covering every certification a Texas private security officer needs, all under one training house.

01

Advanced Security Operations
& Force Application

Develops officers across all levels — equipping them to apply force lawfully, use equipment effectively, and perform with discipline in real-world security environments.

Force Block
// LVL.02
Certification

Level II CertificationFoundation Tier

Establishes the legal and professional foundation of private security — covering authority, limitations, and officer responsibility.

TIER // ENTRY Enroll →
// LVL.03
Certification

Level III CertificationArmed Tier

Develops armed security capability — integrating firearms proficiency, use of force decision-making, and applied defensive tactics.

TIER // ARMED Enroll →
// LVL.04
Certification

Level IV CertificationPersonal Protection

Advances officers into personal protection operations — focusing on client safety, threat assessment, and protective movement.

TIER // PPO Enroll →
// TX.OC
Certification

TXPSB OC CertificationChemical Agent

Trains officers in the lawful deployment of chemical agents — providing a critical intermediate force option on the use-of-force continuum.

FORCE // INTERMEDIATE Enroll →
// DT.ASP
Certification

ASP / Defensive TacticsABC · Baton · Cuffing · Light · OC · Decon

Builds hands-on control skills — allowing officers to manage subjects safely and effectively without escalating force unnecessarily. Covers ASP-ABC, baton, cuffing, tactical flashlight, OC and decontamination.

HANDS-ON // CONTROL Enroll →
02

Life Preservation
& Legal Authority

Prepares officers to respond to active threats, control critical injuries, and operate within the law — ensuring they can act decisively when seconds matter.

Life Block
// ALERRT
Certification

ALERRT — CRASEActive Threat Response

Prepares security officers to respond to active threats with clarity, control, and purpose — equipping them to protect lives before law enforcement arrives.

RESPONSE // CIVILIAN Enroll →
// STB
Certification

Stop The BleedCritical Hemorrhage Control

Equips security officers to control life-threatening hemorrhage with speed, precision, and confidence — enabling them to preserve life in the critical minutes before EMS arrives.

MEDICAL // TCCC Enroll →
// LTC
Certification

License To Carry (LTC)Texas Handgun Authority

Establishes the legal authority and responsibility to carry a handgun — training officers to operate with discipline, control, and full accountability in the use of deadly force.

LEGAL // AUTHORITY Enroll →
✓
Integrated Courses All certifications are included with tuition and issued upon successful completion. One training house. Zero parting out.
Featured Course · New

AVERT.

Active Violence Emergency Response Training

When violence erupts, the gap between the first shot and the first responder is measured in lives. AVERT closes that gap. Officers learn to recognize, respond to, and control active violence events — integrating threat neutralization with immediate trauma intervention for the critical minutes that decide outcomes.

  • Threat Recognition
  • Rapid Response Protocol
  • Active Violence Control
  • Casualty Care Under Threat
  • Scene Command
  • Civilian Protection
Request Enrollment → // Contact For Pricing
// Discipline
Active Violence
// Focus
Respond · Control · Save
// Window

// Standard

04 / Training

Defensive Tactics
& Use of Force

A hands-on, physically demanding course built to develop real capability. Force is applied only when justified — but when it is, it must be decisive, controlled, and defensible.

OC Exposure & Deployment

  • Spray patterns and distance management
  • Inert exposure and stress conditioning
  • Post-deployment procedures
  • Decontamination protocol

Restraint Systems

  • Hinged cuffs, chain cuffs, zip cuffs (tri-folds)
  • Proper application under resistance
  • Search procedures
  • Control positioning

Hands-On Control

  • Compliance to non-compliance transitions
  • Subject control under stress
  • Ground control and recovery positioning
  • Articulation of action and intent

Baton Application

  • Friction lock, non-friction, expandable
  • Target zones and escalation thresholds
  • Legal considerations and articulation
  • Drawing under stress

Flashlight Integration

  • Low-light control techniques
  • Disorientation methodology
  • Positional advantage in dark environments
  • Tool transition under threat

Scenario-Based Training

  • Bag drills — reaction, targeting, stress
  • Controlled escalation scenarios
  • REDMAN evolutions (instructor discretion)
  • Articulation drills post-engagement
!

Training Standard

This course is physically demanding. Students should arrive prepared. Hydration is mandatory — bring your own water source. Expect sustained physical activity and stress exposure.

Hydrate Endure Articulate
// Operator Kit · Platform Coverage
05 / Capabilities

Train Like You'll
Have To Fight.

OPLO trains across every platform a modern security professional may put hands on — from concealed handgun to long gun, low-light to blade. The standard is fluency, not familiarity.

// 01 · Sidearm
Handgun
Primary · Sidearm

Draw, present, and fight from concealment to retention. Pistol fundamentals through advanced manipulation under stress.

// Striker · Hammer · Sub-Compact · Duty
// 02 · Long Gun
AR / Carbine
Patrol · Defensive

AR-15 / M4 platform proficiency. Zeroing, transitions, malfunctions, and shooting on the move under realistic load.

// 5.56 · 300BLK · Optic · Iron
// 03 · Breacher
Shotgun
Close · Decisive

Pump and semi-auto platforms. Shell management, slug-to-buck transitions, and combative use at engagement distance.

// 12 GA · Pump · Semi · Combat
// 04 · Low-Light
NODs
Night · Reduced Light

Working under reduced light: flashlight technique, weapon-mounted lights, and exposure to night vision platform principles.

// Light · WML · Laser · NV
// 05 · Empty Hand
Hands & Blade
Last Resort · Always Ready

Empty-hand control, weapon retention, edged-weapon awareness, and the reality of distance, cover, and movement.

// Control · Retention · Awareness
→

The standard is fluency, not familiarity.

OPLO doesn't qualify you to a minimum. We train you until the platform stops being an object and becomes an extension of decision-making — under stress, in the dark, on the move, when it counts.

// CERTIFIED EXCELLENCE · OPLO.GOLD

This isn't training that meets the minimum.
It's the standard the minimum should be measured against.
